ORDER PURSUANT TO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, WILLIAM W $14,551.75 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,551.75, (SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION FOR DETAILS. )

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. US BANK IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST DEFENDANT WILLIAM LEE IN THE AMOUNT OF $14,551.75 PLUS COSTS AS DETERMINED BY THE MEMORANDUM OF COSTS PROCEDURES. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR# 8600 =302/HK

Off Calendar Aug-24-2018 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Aug-01-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff U.S. Bank National Association's motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed. US Bank is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant William Lee in the amount of $14,551.75 plus costs as determined by the memorandum of costs procedures. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk
